content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based green session with Pharma (+1.91%), Auto (+0.89%), IT (+0.80%), and PSU Bank (+1.06%) leading. VIX cooling -2.7% to 17.43 supports risk-on. Global cues firm (Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is largely in-the-money with multiple winners — focus on locking gains via SL trails, not piling on more long exposure into already-extended names.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.3% (locked-in winner). Current SL 1035 is ABOVE CMP 1046.50? Check: 1035 < 1046.50, so SL is below CMP by ~1.1% — too tight (forced stopout risk on intraday wobble). Loosening SL is REJECTED by guardrail (can only tighten). Holding SL at 1035 is fine — it's already above entry locking +5.2%. No change needed; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1035 already locks ~+5.2% vs entry 984. CMP 1046.50 — SL gap ~1.1% which is at the floor of trail discipline. Q4 turnaround intact, target 1110 still ~6% away. Hold; will trail higher only if price clears 1062 R1."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 124.00 vs SL 119 (~4% below). Gold consolidating after 20% correction from peak; macro hedge value preserved. SL well-placed; no edit needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2%, made ATH 1751 today, now CMP 1733.90. SL already at 1715 (entry + locked breakeven + ₹15). Trimming target to 1780 (close to today's high) — Elara downgrade flags valuation, promoter stake-sale overhang, modest upside left. R:R from CMP: ~46 reward vs 19 risk = 2.4 — acceptable. Target change is the only adjustment; SL stays."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%, CMP 206.72 vs SL 206 — extremely tight, ~0.35% gap. SL is essentially at-the-money; if it triggers the loss is contained. Cannot loosen SL (guardrail). Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%, structural turnaround intact. Let SL do its job; don't over-manage."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 4657.40 vs SL 4575 (entry, 1.8% gap). Tightening SL up to 4595 locks small gain (+0.4% vs entry) and maintains 1.34% gap below CMP — within trail discipline. Defence theme strong, new CMD catalyst, Q4 results May 14 upcoming — tighter SL appropriate ahead of binary event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%, CMP 7028 vs SL 6950 (1.1% gap — at floor). Stored SL=6950, proposing 6950 = no change. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875bps), 52w high zone. SL 6950 sits 1.1% below CMP 7028 — at trail-gap floor. Don't tighten further or risk forced stopout on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, CMP 834.20 vs SL 825 (1.1% gap). Wagon basket rallied hard, today's gap-up faded from 862 high. Thesis intact, SL well placed. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, CMP 365.55 vs SL 358 (2.1% gap). Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending book crossed Rs 2 lakh cr, MOSL Buy Rs 325→well exceeded. Stock made new 52w high today (372.50). SL at 358 fine. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, CMP 828.35 — broke 52w high today (843). SL 812 sits ~2% below CMP. FMCG defensive, Q4 revenue +22% but EBITDA margin contraction concerning. Hold; will trail if 843 breakout sustains."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 3266 vs SL 3245 (0.65% gap — very tight). Q4 PAT +42%, dividend Rs 33/share, top Nifty gainer today +5.14%. Cannot loosen SL. Held positions tend to defend at VWAP 3289; if SL trips, accept the small loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, CMP 1278.80 vs SL 1230 (3.8% gap). Q4 blowout, gap +11% today. SL well below entry providing room; target 1330 is ~4% away. Will trail to entry 1259 once price clears 1295 R-zone with conviction. For now, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 16,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 3025.00,
      "stop_loss": 2900.00,
      "target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Defence shipbuilder, FY26 PAT +41.8% YoY, Q4 EBITDA +61%, order book Rs 18.5K-27.5K cr with potential next-gen corvette ~Rs 33K cr in pipeline. Stock recovered from May-4 dip (2778) on resumed defence theme momentum, today +9.1%. Position size: 16×3025 = ₹48,400 (~4.8% of portfolio). SL 2900 = 4.1% risk. Risk per trade: 4.8% × 4.1% = 0.20% of portfolio (within 0.5% budget). R:R = 200/125 = 1.6:1 ✓. Capital Goods cluster: only HAL+TITAGARH currently held — within cluster discipline. Sector exposure remains <35%. Conviction tempered (0.65) due to sharp +49% April rally — sized small."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 416min ago. CMP 134.53 — order should have filled or be near-filling. Per ORDER HYGIENE rule, do NOT stack a second BUY. Letting working order play out. If unfilled by 14:00 will reassess/cancel."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+21% one-day spike on Zaynich USFDA optimism — chasing such moves is the textbook trap. Single-event regulatory binary mid-2026 dominates risk-reward. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + MUFG stake building constructive, but +10.6% gap day with already-extended chart. Financial Services cluster: PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL already held. Adding CAMS would be third Financial Services name — at cluster cap. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pharma rally strong but no full data provided in deep dive section. Without supplementary research, cannot establish thesis. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 below CMP 1046.50 by 1.1%. At trail-gap floor; tightening further risks self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge; SL 119 well-placed at -4% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715,
      "reasoning": "SL stays at 1715 (locked breakeven+); target trimmed to 1780 given Elara downgrade and ATH valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 206 essentially at CMP; cannot loosen. Let position resolve to SL or recover."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 4575 to 4595 — locks small gain, maintains 1.34% gap below CMP, and approaching May-14 board meeting (binary catalyst)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 at trail-gap floor (1.1% below CMP 7028). No further tightening without forced-stopout risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 at 1.1% gap; thesis intact post WB election narrative."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, fresh 52w high today; SL 358 at 2.1% gap is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "52w high breakout in progress, SL 812 gives room. Trail post-confirmation only."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3245 at 0.65% gap — tight; cannot loosen. Strong Q4 + dividend should support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big Q4 gap-up; SL 1230 well below entry 1259. Will trail to BE only after 1295 holds with volume."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA, CAMS, MARICO breakout — keep watching but not chasing. AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, AJANTPHARM merit deeper research next pulse if pharma sector momentum continues. HFCL existing pending order is the active expression.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed at 60%, room for ~20% more before soft cap. Book is winner-heavy (8 of 11 in green) — discipline this session is locking gains, not adding aggressively. Capital Goods + Defence cluster (HAL + TITAGARH + GRSE proposed) reaches ~13-14% of capital — within limits. Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL) ~13% — capped here, no third name added. HAL May-14 board meeting tightens disposition there. Pending HFCL MIS order being watched; will cancel if unfilled by 14:00."
}
